steps.t: Tham Varan is east of Tinnudir and beyond Tham Nambarth. Gúrhebnir asked you to venture to Tham Varan and inspect several crumbling seals to determine…
The Rangers are at Tinnudir, west of Tham Varan and Tham Nambarth. One of the Rangers will be interested to learn of the few lines you were able to re…
